name: checkout-worktree
description: Open a git worktree from a URI — fetch, create worktree, open folder.

checkout-worktree.gitFolders.description: Folders containing your git repositories (searched when resolving repo names).

checkout-worktree.worktreeParentDir.description: Parent directory for new worktrees. Defaults to '.worktrees/' inside the repo root (add to .gitignore).

checkout-worktree.postCheckoutCommand.description: Shell command to run in the worktree directory after checkout (e.g. 'mise run worktree:setup'). Runs only for newly created worktrees.
